markdown:
#  Download an Open Submittals Report 
##  Background 
The Company Open Submittals Reports is a CSV download that lists all of the submittals in the 'Open' status across all of your company's Procore projects.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the Company 360 Reporting tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * You can alternatively create a report that includes data from the Submittals tool. See [Create a Company Single Tool Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/reports-company/tutorials/create-a-company-single-tool-report) or [Create a Project Single Tool Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/reports-project/tutorials/create-a-project-single-tool-report).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Company **360 Reporting** tool.
  2. Click **Open Submittals Report**.   
The system downloads a CSV file listing all of the submittals in the 'Open' status across all of your company's projects. The report includes:
     * Project #
     * Project Name
     * Project Type
     * Spec Section
     * # (Reports)
     * Title
     * Type
     * Revision
     * Created Date
     * Ball In Court
     * Response
     * Due Date
     * **Status**. Shows that the submittal is in the 'Open' status.


## See Also
  * [View a Single Tool Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/reports-company/tutorials/view-a-report)
  * [Share a Company Single Tool Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/reports-company/tutorials/share-a-company-single-tool-report)
  * [360 Reporting (Company) - Single Tool Reports](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/reports-company/permissions-360-reporting-single-tool-reports)


**Project #.** This is the number of the project assigned to it upon project creation.
**Project Name.** This is the name of the project.
**Project Type**. This is the project type. _Note_ : Your Procore Administrator can customize these selections. See appears in the report. See [Add Project Type to a Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/set-the-project-type).
**Spec Section**. Denotes the corresponding section from the project's specifications book. See [Where do the selections in the 'Specification Sections' drop-down list in the Submittals tool come from?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-where-do-the-selections-in-the-spec-sections-drop-down-list-come-from)
**#**. Shows the submittal number.
**Title**. The descriptive name that best summarizes the information in the submittal.
**Type**. The information type associated with the submittal. The default type selections in Procore include: _Document_ , _Pay Request, Payroll,_ _Plans_ , _Prints_ , _Product Information_ , _Product Manual_ , _Sample_ , _Shop Drawing_ , _Specification,_ and _Other_. See [Create Custom Submittal Types](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/create-custom-submittal-types).
**Revision**. The current revision.
**Created Date**. Indicates the date the submittal was created.
**Ball In Court**. Shows the name of the person responsible for completing the next action.
**Response**. The response(s) of the approver(s) on the [submittal workflow](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms). Typically, approvers are members of the design team and project who must review and then approve or reject the contents of the submittal. See [What are the default submittal responses in Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-default-submittal-responses-in-procore) and [How do I customize submittal responses?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-customize-submittal-responses)
**Due Date**. The date on which response(s) to the submittal are due from the approvers designated on the [submittal workflow](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms).
title: Download an Open Submittals Report
description: How to download the Company level Open Submittals Report.
